title: 2 Pack Cleaner Head Clip Latch Tab Button Replacement for Dyson V7 V8 V10 V11 V15 Vacuum Cleaner Extension Wand Clip Button, Wand Tube/Illumination Tool Button with Spring
features: Wand Tool/Cleaner Head clip latch tab button, 100% compatible with Dyson V7 V8 V10 V11 V15 SV10 SV11 SV12 SV14 SV15 SV22 vacuum cleaner electric drive parts, replacement for dyson cleaner head, illumination tool, wand, ect.
Our vacuum head replacement almost the same as the original ones. Made of high-quality material, good workmanship and more durable.
You do not need to worry about the installation, we will provide installation instruction videos, only take 1 minute to help you replace a new wand tube clip latch tab button.
The packing list includes: 2 pieces red wand button, 2 pieces high quality spring.
We offer a one year warranty, if you have any problems within this time, please contact us, we will do our best to solve the problem with you.
description: Product Description Features: 100% brand new and high quality. Made of high quality material, durable and practical to use. Delicate and exquisite, highly match the original equipment. Solid and durable, long service life. Easy to install and reliable to use. Specifications: This is the Wand Tool/Cleaner Head/Illumination Tool Clip Latch Tab Button Replacement for Dyson vacuum cleaner electric drive parts. Fitment: Compatible with Dyson V7 V8 V10 V11 V15 Vacuum Cleaner. Tips: 1. Ensure that the appliance is disconnected from the charger before installing the clip latch tab button. 2. Suggest you to wear work gloves to protect your hands. 3. After the installation is complete, check whether the clip latch tab button is properly installed. Package Contents: 2*Red wand button 2*High quality spring Tips: 1. Ensure that the appliance is disconnected from the charger before installing the clip latch tab button. 2. Suggest you to wear work gloves to protect your hands. 3. After the installation is complete, check whether the clip latch tab button is properly installed.
